name.zh: 正气塘龙珠 · 二〇二二年

shortDescription.en: Mountain sunlight folded into small pearls—bright, honest, built to age.
shortDescription.zh: 山头气韵揉成一粒粒龙珠，汤色明亮，宜藏宜饮。

description.en: From Zhengqitang’s slopes, this raw pu'er carries the clarity of high-elevation leaf: lifted aroma, clean bitterness that opens into lasting sweetness. Shaped as dragon pearls so each steep stays generous—ideal when you want Mengku character without committing to a whole cake.
description.zh: 正气塘一带的生茶，香清气高，苦底化得快、回甘长。龙珠形态一次一粒，既保留山头个性，又适合日常慢饮或与友人分享。

name.zh: 小户赛龙珠 · 二〇二三年

shortDescription.en: Honeyed lift and soft strength—the gentle side of the mountain.
shortDescription.zh: 甜香柔和，山野气却不张扬，像雾里的花蜜。

description.en: Xiaohusai is loved for its approachable sweetness and rounded body. This 2023 raw pu'er in pearl form keeps the infusion steady cup after cup: florals up top, a creamy middle, and a finish that lingers like late spring air.
description.zh: 小户赛茶常以甜润、饱满见长。此茶以龙珠呈现，冲泡稳定，花香与蜜感层层展开，尾韵绵长，适合想认识勐库茶又怕过于霸道的茶友。

name.zh: 小户赛龙珠 · 二〇二四年

shortDescription.en: Young leaf, vivid energy—a lively chapter from the same beloved garden.
shortDescription.zh: 新茶活气足，香扬水柔，是春天留在杯里的回声。

description.en: A fresher year of Xiaohusai raw material: more lift, more aromatic sparkle, still anchored by the area’s honeyed calm. The pearls invite slow exploration—watch how the soup deepens as the session unfolds.
description.zh: 同年份更靠新茶，香气更扬、鲜爽感更强，却仍带小户赛特有的甜与柔。龙珠便于控制浓度，适合慢慢喝懂一泡茶的变化。

shortDescription.en: Harmony in hand: one slice, one honest bowl of Yunnan spring.
shortDescription.zh: 一团和气，一片一泡，把山野的从容带进日常。

description.en: Named for gathering without strain, this raw pu'er is cut into single-serve slices so ritual becomes easy—office, travel, or a quiet hour at home. Expect the same backbone of sun-dried leaf: clear, lively, and kind to the palate.
description.zh: 茶片独立包装，取饮省心。茶汤仍保持晒青茶的清透与力度，是「认真喝茶」与「随时能喝」之间的折中，适合作为随身口粮或待客时的轻松开场。

shortDescription.en: No flourish—just leaf, water, and truth in the cup.
shortDescription.zh: 不夸饰，只把茶的本味交给你。

description.en: “Rushi” speaks to plainness: this raw pu'er slice is meant to taste like what it is—mountain air, sun, and careful pressing. Brew it when you want a straight answer from the tea, not a performance.
description.zh: 「如实」重在本真：香气与滋味不刻意雕琢，让茶自己说话。适合习惯用舌头判断品质、偏爱清爽山韵与真实回甘的饮者。

shortDescription.en: A full circle of leaf—sweetness, patience, and room to grow old.
shortDescription.zh: 一饼收尽小户赛的甜与厚，留给时间与灰尘慢慢说话。

description.en: Pressed as a cake, this Xiaohusai raw pu'er is for those who keep tea on the shelf as well as in the cup. The profile is classically generous: honeyed notes, smooth astringency, and a body that rewards both young drinking and quiet years in storage.
description.zh: 饼茶更适合长期存放与逐步转化。此茶延续小户赛甜润、饱满的特点，当下品饮已悦人，若存数年，香气与汤质会更有层次。

shortDescription.en: Upright mountain bones—structure, return sweetness, and a long echo.
shortDescription.zh: 山骨端正，回甘如钟，是生普里「有骨架」的那一类。

description.en: Zhengqitang teas are often praised for clarity and structure: the liquor feels honest, the aftertaste returns again and again. This cake is a study in balance—enough power to mark the moment, enough finesse to stay elegant.
description.zh: 正气塘茶常以清晰的山韵与持久的回甘著称。此饼茶汤有层次，苦甜平衡，既适合当下品饮，也适合作为中长期陈化的选择。

shortDescription.en: Old arbor depth, rolled small—each pearl a slow story.
shortDescription.zh: 乔木底蕴揉成一粒粒，耐泡、有厚味。

description.en: Arbor material brings weight: thicker soup, richer mouthfeel, and a calm that lingers. These dragon pearls carry that legacy in a form that stays easy to share—one pearl at a time, gongfu or grandpa style.
description.zh: 乔木茶往往汤厚、韵深。龙珠让厚味不至于一次泡太多，适合慢慢体会茶汤的饱满与喉韵，也适合与茶友分饮。

shortDescription.en: Wind, mist, and slow growth—height written into every leaf.
shortDescription.zh: 高山云雾养出的慢，落在茶汤里是清与长。

description.en: High-elevation arbor leaf tends to offer clean aromatics and a cool, lingering finish. This raw pu'er cake is a quiet celebration of terroir: drink it when you want the mountain without the noise.
description.zh: 高山乔木茶常带清冽香气与悠长的回甘与清凉感。此饼适合喜欢「干净山韵」、追求清爽与耐泡的饮者，也可作为长期存放的基底。

name.zh: 大叶熟茶龙珠 · 二〇二四年

shortDescription.en: Earth turned gentle—soft, dark, and welcoming from the first sip.
shortDescription.zh: 渥堆后的醇与暖，像旧木桌与深夜灯。

description.en: Ripe pu'er is fermented leaf made for comfort: smooth texture, mellow depth, and none of raw tea’s sharp edge. These large-leaf pearls brew a rich, dark liquor—ideal when you want warmth without fuss, or a gift that speaks of care.
description.zh: 熟茶经渥堆发酵，茶性温和，汤感顺滑。大叶料往往更醇厚。龙珠形式便于控制浓淡，适合秋冬、晚间或肠胃不喜生冷茶的人群。

shortDescription.en: Forest floor and sweet grain—ripe tea, folded into paper-thin ritual.
shortDescription.zh: 木质与糯甜，一片一泡，熟茶的温厚随手可及。

description.en: A ripe pu'er profile leaning woody and comforting: think aged wood, warm grain, a clean finish. Slices make it effortless—one piece, one bowl, whether you’re at a desk or on the road.
description.zh: 此款熟茶突出木香与醇滑，汤色红浓，入口绵柔。茶片适合快节奏生活里仍想喝一口「正经熟茶」的人。

name.zh: 福宝 · 古树晒红茶片

shortDescription.en: Sun and wind instead of oven heat—florals that bloom without haste.
shortDescription.zh: 日晒而非高温提香，花蜜与果韵更自然。

description.en: Sun-dried Yunnan red tea keeps more of the leaf’s original perfume: softer tannins, brighter aromatics, and a sweetness that feels like light through leaves. The slices are a gentle invitation—red tea for people who don’t want heaviness.
description.zh: 晒红工艺以日光干燥为主，茶性相对温和，常带花蜜、果香。茶片方便冲泡，适合喜欢红茶却怕闷涩、偏爱清甜感的人。

name.en: Ancient Tree Black Tea — Gift Collection

shortDescription.en: Copper liquor, malt and honey—dignified red tea from old roots.
shortDescription.zh: 古树为骨，汤色红亮，蜜韵与麦芽香并陈。

description.en: Yunnan black tea from ancient-tree material carries fullness and a honeyed calm that fills the room. This gift presentation is for sharing: gongfu with friends, a quiet afternoon, or a gesture that says warmth without words.
description.zh: 古树红茶通常汤厚、甜润，带蜜香与麦芽感，适合工夫泡或稍坐杯。礼袋形式便于馈赠，也适合作为家中小聚的「压轴甜汤」。

shortDescription.en: Almost nothing but leaf and air—sweet, pale, and easy to love.
shortDescription.zh: 淡而不薄，清甜沁人，像月光浸过的水。

description.en: White tea asks little and gives clarity: soft florals, clean sweetness, a body that glides. These slices keep the experience portable—light caffeine, gentle flavor, a companion for late work or slow mornings.
description.zh: 白茶工艺轻，保留较多氨基酸与清甜感，茶性相对平和。茶片适合清淡口味、初次尝试白茶或需要低刺激饮品的场景。
